news.headline: Biden blocks Nippon Steel’s proposed takeover of US Steel.
HOPE Therapeutics, Inc. will host an investor workshop for Qualified Institutional Investors at Mar-A-Lago Club on Jan 6, 2025.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, HOPE Therapeutics, Inc., a subsidiary of NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRXP), based in Miami, announced an invitation to Qualified Institutional Investors to attend an investor workshop. The purpose of the workshop is to seek support for planned acquisitions aimed at expanding a national network of interventional psychiatry practices.该 workshop aims to raise funding to acquire more practices focused on improving mental health services.

news.headline: 2025 wave season sees surge in cruise vacations as travelers seek warm escapes. Squaremouth data reveals top trends.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, the 2025 wave season has begun, and tourists are eagerly boarding cruise ships to avoid the winter chill. Squaremouth, the country's premier travel insurance marketplace, has released new findings highlighting the key trends for this season. With a surge in interest, the data points to increasing numbers of travelers booking cruises for their winter getaways.

news.headline: Carmell closes $1.85M PIPE Investment offering 8,065,210 shares of common stock and warrants priced at $0.23.
news.summary: Carmell Corporation, a bio-aesthetics company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol CTCX, announced the completion of a private placement deal on January 3, 2025. The agreement, initially disclosed on December 23, 2024, involved the issuance and sale of 8,065,210 shares of common stock and an equal number of five-year warrants, each priced at $0.23 per share. The private placement generated $1.85 million in total gross proceeds, excluding offering expenses and fees. This amount was slightly higher than the closing price of CTCX on December 23, 2024.

news.headline: SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) to hold conference call on Jan 27, 2025, at 8 am Eastern Time to discuss Q4 & full year 2024 results.
news.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) based in San Francisco, is organizing a conference call on January 27, 2025, at 8 a.m. EST to review financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This one-stop financial services platform assists members in borrowing, saving, spending, investing, and safeguarding their money. In addition, SoFi intends to publish its financial results for Q4 and the fiscal year 2024 on its investor relations website.

news.headline: Evercore ISI's 11th Annual Utility CEO Conference to be held in Scottsdale, Arizona on Jan 8-10, 2025, with 33 leading companies in attendance.
news.summary: Evercore (NYSE: EVR) has announced its plans to hold the 11th annual Utility CEO Conference from January 8-10, 2025 in Scottsdale, Arizona. The event will gather 33 top companies in the power & utilities sector to discuss their roles in the advancing AI landscape. As power and infrastructure are crucial for new data center developments, this sector is becoming a major player in AI innovation. The conference aims to facilitate networking and collaboration among key industry players shaping the AI revolution.

news.headline: Swave Photonics secures $28.27M Series A funding for new 3D holographic display products.
news.summary: Swave Photonics, a company specializing in true holographic display technology, has recently finalized its Series A funding round with a total of €27 million ($28.27 million). This funding milestone was achieved by the company's operations in Leuven, Belgium, and Silicon Valley, California.

news.headline: D. E. Shaw expresses disappointment with Air Products and Chemicals board, plans to support change at 2025 annual meeting.
news.summary: D. E. Shaw group has voiced dissatisfaction over the Board's inefficiency in handling the CEO transition process. The group disclosed plans to push for reforms at the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting. Based in New York, D. E. Shaw operates as a worldwide investment and technology development company.

news.headline: Global CX outsourcing market valued at $106.72 billion in 2023, expected to reach $171.81 billion in 2028, with top 8 players holding 30% market share.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the CX Outsourcing Market has recently been included on ResearchAndMarkets.com's platform. The analysis covers Deployment Types (On Premise and Cloud), Components (Services and Software), Industry Verticals (Retail, BFSI, IT & Telecom, Healthcare, Government, Energy & Utilities, Others), Region, Size, and Trends, with forecasts up to 2029. The global CX outsourcing market saw a value of US$106.72 billion in 2023, with projections indicating it will reach US$171.81 billion by 2028.

news.headline: WNS to announce Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Jan 23, 2025 at 6:00 a.m. Eastern time. #WNS #Q3results
news.summary: WNS, an international company with headquarters in New York, London, and Mumbai, revealed plans to unveil its financial and operating results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025. The announcement is scheduled for January 23, 2025, at around 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This update, anticipated by investors and analysts, will provide insights into the company's performance, with key figures and data expected to be shared at that time.

news.headline: PriceSmart changes earnings release date to January 8, 2025 after market closes, impacting Q1 fiscal report.
news.summary: PriceSmart, Inc. stated it will reveal its financial results for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2025 on January 8, 2025, post-market closure. The announcement came out on January 3, 2025. PriceSmart, traded as PSMT on the NASDAQ, had initially intended to release its results on a different date.

news.headline: Biltmore celebrates 130th anniversary with a new King Tut exhibition running from March 21, 2025 to Jan. 4, 2026.
news.summary: In Asheville, North Carolina, on January 3, 2025, Biltmore has exciting news to share. They are introducing a world-class exhibition, special seasonal events, and an enhanced hotel experience in celebration of their 130th anniversary. Starting from March 21, 2025, to January 4, 2026, visitors can enjoy the new offerings at Biltmore.

news.headline: AbbVie to report full-year and fourth-quarter 2024 financial results on Jan 31, 2025, before market opens; hosting earnings call at 8 a.m.
news.summary: In North Chicago, Illinois, AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) is set to reveal its financial performance for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024 on January 31, 2025, prior to the market opening. The announcement will include a live webcast of the earnings conference call scheduled for 8 a.m. Central time. This update will shed light on the company's key figures and insights for investors and stakeholders to evaluate AbbVie's progress.

news.headline: Dove encourages women to redefine resolutions, as 1 in 2 do it due to body dissatisfaction. Launches body confidence series.
news.summary: A recent study by Dove revealed that half of women make resolutions due to body dissatisfaction. In response, Dove has introduced its inaugural body confidence series for women. The initiative aims to address this issue. The research was conducted in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., with the findings released on Jan. 3, 2025, via PRNewswire. The series is part of Dove's efforts to promote positive body image and mental health among women.

news.headline: Atlanta Housing, Invest Atlanta, and others collaborate to transform community with 151 mixed-income units in Bowen Homes Phase I.
news.summary: Atlanta Housing (AH) has announced the successful financial closing to kickstart a community transformation project in Atlanta on January 3, 2025. In partnership with Invest Atlanta, the City of Atlanta, the Georgia Department of Community Affairs, and the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development, the initiative will see the development of 151 mixed-income units. This project signifies a significant step towards addressing housing needs and fostering inclusive communities.

news.headline: Sabine Royalty Trust declares $0.448330/monthly distribution for Jan 2025, payable on Jan 29 to unit holders of record on Jan 15.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Argent Trust Company, acting as the Trustee of the Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR), announced a cash distribution of $0.448330 per unit to its holders of beneficial interest. The payment is scheduled for January 29, 2025, for shareholders recorded on January 15.

news.headline: Company reveals financial results for Q4 2024.
Avadel Pharmaceuticals will share its 2024 financial highlights on Jan. 8 during a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Dublin-based Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (Nasdaq: AVDL) has disclosed its plan to conduct a conference call and live webcast on Wednesday, January 8, 2025. The event, scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET, will feature discussions on the company's recent developments and preliminary unaudited financial results concerning the fourth quarter and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. Avadel is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to enhancing medicines to improve lives.

news.headline: Cerence AI partners with NVIDIA to enhance CaLLM language models, expanding collaboration.
news.summary: Cerence AI has recently revealed an enhanced partnership with NVIDIA to improve the functions of its CaLLM language models. This collaboration aims to utilize advanced technology and expertise from NVIDIA to further develop and expand the capabilities of Cerence AI's language models. Through this partnership, Cerence AI looks to leverage NVIDIA's resources to enhance the performance of its language models, presenting a significant step forward in the field of AI technology. The collaboration between Cerence AI and NVIDIA signifies a strategic move to combine efforts and push the boundaries of innovation in artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies granted new employee 311,000 stock options under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Jan 2, 2025.
news.summary: In Dallas on January 3, 2025, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSHA) revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors awarded a new employee an option to buy 311,000 shares of the company's common stock on January 2, 2025. This move was made under the Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan as a significant inducement for the new personnel joining the company, as outlined by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Taysha focuses on developing adeno-associated virus (AAV)-based gene therapies for severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system (CNS).

news.headline: Inari Medical will present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15 at 8:15am PT (NASDAQ: NARI).
news.summary: Inari Medical, Inc., a medical device company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NARI, based in Irvine, California, shared today that its management team will be speaking at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2025, at 8:15 a.m. Pacific Time. The company aims to help patients with venous and vascular ailments, focusing on transforming lives through innovative medical solutions. This event signifies a significant opportunity for Inari Medical to showcase its advancements in the field at a notable industry gathering.

news.headline: New GM, Jacque Harms, named at KKTV in Colorado Springs by Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) on Jan. 03, 2025 - CBS affiliate.
news.summary: In Atlanta on January 3, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) announced Jacque Harms as the upcoming General Manager of KKTV, the CBS affiliate located in Colorado Springs, Colorado.

news.headline: Gentex will release Q4 and year end 2024 financial results on January 31, and host a call at 9:30am ET.
news.summary: Gentex Corporation is set to unveil its financial performance for Q4 and the full year of 2024 on Friday, January 31. The announcement will be made before the market opens on that day, with a subsequent conference call scheduled at 9:30 am Eastern Time. This update is eagerly awaited by investors and analysts to assess the company's annual figures and fourth-quarter results.

news.headline: A-Mark Precious Metals declares $0.20 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Jan 28, 2025, to stockholders as of Jan 14.
news.summary: A-Mark Precious Metals, Inc., based in El Segundo, California, disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share on January 3, 2025. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is part of the company's ongoing dividend program. Shareholders as of January 14, 2025, will receive the dividend on January 28, 2025. A-Mark Precious Metals, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol AMRK, operates as a fully integrated precious metals platform.

news.headline: Asure Software (Nasdaq: ASUR) to attend 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference in NY on Jan. 15, 2024.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Asure Software, Inc., a leading provider of cloud-based Human Capital Management (“HCM”) software solutions listed on Nasdaq as ASUR, will be participating in the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 15, 2024 in New York, NY.

news.headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals to present at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2025 at 2:15pm PT.
news.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, revealed that they are scheduled to participate in the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2025, at 2:15 pm PT. The presentation by the company, which is listed on Nasdaq as MDGL, will be broadcasted live and will be available for viewing on their Investor Relations Site under Events and Presentations.

news.headline: Fnac Darty announces final results and terms of settlement in joint procedure.
Artronic Design unveils Komutr, world's first MagSafe earbuds at CES 2025, redefining wireless audio. #Komutr #CES2025
news.summary: Innovative wireless earbuds are changing the game in audio technology, featuring a sleek case design and advanced features. Komutr, the pioneering MagSafe earbuds, is making waves with its debut at CES 2025 in Las Vegas. This revolutionary product is set to redefine wireless audio with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.40% January 2 vs 4.49% December 31.
Nurse Next Door Program boosts grant opportunities in 2025, offering up to $8,000 grants and $15,000 in down payment assistance for nurses aiming to become homeowners.
news.summary: In Tampa Bay, Florida, Nurse Next Door®, a prominent national home-buying program, has announced revised grant amounts for 2025 to aid nurses and healthcare workers in purchasing homes. The program now offers non-repayable grants of up to $8,000, in addition to down payment assistance programs granting up to $15,000. These figures may be higher in pricey housing areas, ensuring affordability in competitive real estate markets. This initiative aims to support nurses and healthcare professionals in their homeownership aspirations.

news.headline: US House Speaker vote could affect market-friendly legislation, experts warn. Uncertainty looms as process starts Friday.
news.summary: The U.S. House of Representatives is preparing for a potentially contentious speaker election that could impact market-related legislative actions. Mike Johnson is anticipated to be re-elected, but the timing of the process is uncertain as it kicks off Friday afternoon. Terry Haines, founder of Pangaea Policy, has raised concerns that a prolonged election could create uncertainty for markets about Congress's ability to enact market-friendly measures, such as those related to taxes. This situation mirrors the extended election process from two years ago when Kevin McCarthy needed 15 rounds of voting spread across four days to secure the speaker role.

news.headline: N2OFF and Solterra to develop two 98MWp storage projects in Sicily. N2OFF to hold about 70% ownership.
news.summary: N2OFF is set to increase its ownership in the projects, obtaining around 70%. This move will bolster the company's position in the European energy storage market.

news.headline: Software AI stocks had mixed results on the first day of 2025 trading: Palantir dipped, SoundHound rose, and Snowflake climbed.
news.summary: In the initial trading day of 2025, Palantir's stock and various other software AI stocks displayed a range of performances. Palantir experienced a decrease in its stock value, whereas SoundHound saw an increase. Additionally, Snowflake witnessed a climb in its stock value. The overall market for software AI stocks was characterized by mixed results on this day, indicating varied performances within the sector.

news.headline: Marathon Digital CEO Thiel advises saving in Bitcoin monthly for long-term as it appreciates 29-50% annually over 14 years.
news.summary: Fred Thiel, the CEO of Marathon Digital Holdings, a company listed on the NASDAQ with the symbol MARA, recently discussed the benefits of consistently saving in Bitcoin. Thiel believes that Bitcoin, which is denoted by the symbol BTC, is a wise long-term investment due to its increasing acceptance in traditional financial markets. According to Thiel, Bitcoin has shown remarkable stability over the past 14 years, with only three instances of annual declines, one of which occurred during the global market crisis caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. He stated that, on average, Bitcoin has seen yearly appreciation ranging between 29% and 50%. Thiel's insights were shared during an interview on Fox Business. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: $14B bid by Nippon Steel for U.S. Steel faces rejection by Biden, prompting potential legal and diplomatic issues.
news.summary: Nippon Steel's proposed $14 billion acquisition of the steelmaking company is likely to be blocked by President Biden. If rejected, potential legal battles and international tensions may arise as a result.

news.headline: Carolinas AGC announces 2025 Board with Chair Ty Edmondson, Lynn Hansen as Chair Elect, and Marty Moser as Treasurer.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 3, 2025, Carolinas AGC (CAGC) revealed its newly appointed 2025 Board of Directors. The CAGC Board comprises the following key members: Ty Edmondson from T. A. Loving Company serving as Chair, Lynn Hansen from Crowder Constructors Inc. as Chair Elect, and Marty Moser holding the position of Treasurer.

news.headline: JP Morgan's Misra warns of risk assets reacting to changing interest rates.
Tarkett provides total number of voting rights and shares as of December 31, 2024 in Paris, France.
news.summary: As of December 31st, 2024, Tarkett's share capital in Paris, France, comprised a total of voting rights and shares. This information provides insight into the company's ownership structure and potential influence of shareholders in decision-making processes.

news.headline: Viper Partners focuses on growing vascular surgery practices nationwide through strategic mergers and acquisitions.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Palm Beach, Florida, Viper Partners, a top healthcare investment banking firm, declared its dedication to enhancing vascular surgery practices across the country. The company aims to boost growth and progress through strategic mergers and acquisitions, reinforcing its position in the industry.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase as Nasdaq tests 50-day moving average in 2025. Tesla and Apple lead losses, some stocks show buy signals.
news.summary: In the beginning of 2025, the Nasdaq experienced volatility as it tested its 50-day moving average. Key players like Tesla and Apple saw declines, contributing to the market's uncertain state. Despite this, some stocks showed signals for potential buying opportunities. Dow Jones futures are on the rise, indicating a possible shift in market sentiment. The overall market rally is approaching a critical point following the significant losses from Tesla and Apple. This update signifies the dynamic nature of the current stock market climate.

news.headline: Stay updated on key climate developments this year to better understand the state of our planet.
Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited announces Brian Young as President of Fairfax Insurance Group, with Andrew Barnard becoming Chairman as of Jan. 1, 2025.
news.summary: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited has disclosed that Brian Young took on the role of President of Fairfax Insurance Group starting from January 1, 2025. Andrew Barnard, who served as President since 2011, is now the Chairman of Fairfax Insurance Group. Fairfax is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the tickers TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

news.headline: CME Group achieved record annual ADV of 26.5 million contracts in 2024, driven by growth across all six asset classes. Record ADV in interest rate, agri, FX, and metals products, and record Q4 ADV for U.S. Treasury and cryptocurrency complexes.
news.summary: In the year 2024, there were record high average daily volumes (ADV) in various trading categories, including interest rate, agricultural, foreign exchange, and metals products. The ADV for U.S. Treasury and SOFR complexes also reached all-time highs during this period. Notably, there was a record-breaking ADV achieved outside of the United States. In the fourth quarter of the same year, there was a significant increase in ADV for U.S. Treasury and cryptocurrency complexes. This marked a successful year for trading activities in these sectors, with impressive figures indicating a prosperous market performance.

news.headline: Europe power system simulation software market expected to reach $900.6 million by 2033, growing at CAGR of 7.05% from $417.5 million in 2023 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Europe Power System Simulation Software Market: Focus on Application, Product, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2023-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for power system simulation software in Europe is anticipated to expand significantly, with projections indicating an increase from $417.5 million in 2023 to $900.6 million by 2033. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.05% throughout the forecast period of 2023-2033. The surge in demand for reliable energy management solutions is a key driver across various sectors such as manufacturing.

news.headline: Fairfax Financial declares $15.00 dividend per share payable on Jan 23, 2025, to shareholders of record on Jan 16.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited made a public declaration that it will be issuing a dividend of US$15.00 per share on its multiple voting and subordinate voting shares. Investors recorded as shareholders on January 16, 2025, will receive the payout on January 23, 2025. For those who are not Canadian residents, Canadian withholding tax regulations will be enforced on the dividend payments. Fairfax's stocks are traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange with the symbols TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

news.headline: Small business owners want Congress to focus on taxes, spending, and immigration in 2025 according to NWYC survey.
news.summary: In Dallas on January 3, 2025, small business owners are eager for the new Congress to take action in the coming year. According to a recent survey conducted by National Write Your Congressman (NWYC), a group advocating for small business interests, these entrepreneurs are looking for legislative changes. The survey gathered input from a significant number of small business owners across the nation, showcasing their desire for policies that support their ventures.

news.headline: Europe Maritime Cybersecurity Market set to reach $3.49 billion by 2033, growing at CAGR of 13.64% as per the latest report.
news.summary: A report focusing on the Europe Maritime Cybersecurity Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is estimated to grow significantly, reaching $3.49 billion by 2033 from $972.3 million in 2023, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.64% during the forecast period of 2023-2033. The emphasis is on safeguarding digital assets and networks within the maritime sector from online threats.

news.headline: PBoC vows to cut RRR and interest rates at an appropriate time.
Global Automotive Wires & Cables Market valued at $36.02 billion in 2023, with 5.3% CAGR growth expected from 2025-2030. Asia-Pacific dominates the industry.
news.summary: A report titled "Automotive Wires & Cables Market: Market Size, Trends, Opportunities and Forecast by Application, Vehicle Type, Propulsion Type, Region, By Country: 2020-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global Automotive Wires & Cables Market was valued at USD 36.02 billion in 2023, with a projected growth at a CAGR of 5.3% from 2025 to 2030. The market is experiencing steady growth due to the rising complexity in the automotive industry.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy prepares for cold snap in 2025 across Texas, Louisiana, Mississippi, Indiana, and Ohio. Teams ready for storms and severe weather with PRNewswire report on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: Teams in Texas, Louisiana, and Mississippi are gearing up for imminent storms and severe weather this weekend, alongside bracing for a significant cold front next week. Meanwhile, teams in Indiana and Ohio are preparing for anticipated ice and snowstorms during the upcoming week. As of Jan. 3, 2025, CenterPoint Energy remains vigilant in monitoring the situation as these regions face potential weather challenges.
